note: Machine-readable mirror of crm-journeys.md. If the .md file changes, update this file too and bump version. The runner refuses to proceed on version mismatch.

journeys.title: First-run admin setup
journeys.reason: First-run setup path is lane-specific and cannot be discovered without reading source. Must be piloted by a human.

journeys.title: Create and list a contact
journeys.reason: Expected to be discoverable from the lane's README once a documented HTTP entrypoint exists.

journeys.title: Opportunity through the pipeline
journeys.reason: Depends on pipeline-stage contract being documented.

journeys.title: Task with due date and completion
journeys.reason: Depends on task contract being documented.

journeys.title: Note on a contact
journeys.reason: Depends on note contract being documented.

journeys.title: Dashboard reporting reflects activity
journeys.reason: Widgets are UI-only without a contracted metrics endpoint. v1 harness does not chase DOM.

persistenceProbes.title: Restart survives state
persistenceProbes.reason: Restart hook is lane-specific. Treated as manual until a documented restart contract exists.

persistenceProbes.title: Transaction rollback
persistenceProbes.reason: Requires knowledge of declared constraints; not machine-discoverable in v1.

persistenceProbes.title: Concurrent write
persistenceProbes.reason: Requires concurrency harness outside v1 scope.
